message:
Enhance Tailscale discovery with resilient parsing and warnings (caam-pzei)

- Add GetVersion/GetVersionString to tailscale.Client for CLI version logging
- Add ParseStatus with lenient JSON parsing to tolerate schema drift
- Add ParseWarning type and Status.Warnings for non-fatal parse issues
- Add optional Peer fields (UserID, ExitNode, LastSeen, etc.) for future compat
- Add MachineOverride struct for manual IP/config overrides in setup
- Add DiscoveryWarning type with machine/code/message for ambiguous discovery
- Log tailscale CLI version at discovery time for debugging
- Detect and warn on ambiguous hostname matches (NO_TAILSCALE_MATCH, AMBIGUOUS_MATCH)
- Add GetDiscoveryWarnings/HasDiscoveryWarnings methods to Orchestrator
- Print discovery warnings in PrintDiscoveryResults
- Add comprehensive unit tests for resilient parsing and warning collection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
